title: ExternalClientApplication - Metadata API
description: Represents the header file for an external client application configuration.

contactEmail.description: The email address that Salesforce uses to contact the external client app admin for the subscriber org.

contactPhone.description: The phone number that Salesforce uses to contact the external client app admin for the subscriber org.

distributionState.description: The distribution state of an external client app. Values are: AutoInstalled. For internal use only. Local. Managed. For internal use only. Packaged.

iconUrl.description: The URL for the icon image.

isProtected.description: A package construct that developers use to control the visibility of components in subscriber orgs. Default is false.

label.description: The label for the external client app.

logoUrl.description: The URL for the logo image.

orgScopedExternalApp.description: A unique ID consisting of the org ID and the name of this external client app. Either defined by the developer or auto-generated during the first deployment. The expected value uses this format: [Organization_ID]:[External Client App Name].

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="ExternalClientApplication">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="contactEmail" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="contactPhone" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="distributionState" minOccurs="0" type="tns:ExtlClntAppDistState"/>
        <xsd:element name="iconUrl" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="infoUrl" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="isProtected" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="label" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="logoUrl" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="managedType" minOccurs="0" type="tns:ExtlClntAppManagedType"/>
        <xsd:element name="orgScopedExternalApp" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="ExtlClntAppDistState">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Local"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Packaged"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Managed"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="AutoInstalled"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:simpleType name="ExtlClntAppManagedType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Local"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Global"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: This example shows an ExternalClientApplication component.
